title: Croatian Pecorino Croissant Fritters
description: A fusion of Croatian and Italian flavors, these crispy fritters are a twist on traditional croissants filled with creamy Pecorino cheese.
instructions: Dust the thawed croissant dough with flour and roll out to 1/4 inch thickness.
Cut out circles of dough using a cookie cutter or the rim of a glass.
In a bowl, mix together crumbled Pecorino and Festive cheese.
Place a spoonful of cheese mixture in the center of each dough circle.
Brush the edges of the dough with beaten egg and fold in half to form a triangle.
Heat oil in a deep frying pan to 375°F (190°C).
Fry the fritters for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
Drain on paper towels and serve warm.
